oneLineEn: Ups and downs today — just hold your center.

signals.label: 겁살
signals.english: Robbery Star active today — Worth double-checking big money, valuables and key contracts today.

signals.label: 제왕
signals.english: Peak Star active today — Strong confidence and drive — well-suited to leading.

signals.label: 甲戌 (정재)
signals.english: a sense for substance and stability runs long through this decade — a great tree on dry ground grain woven through

signals.label: 丙午 (정관)
signals.english: responsibility and standing coming into focus colours the year — a midday sun grain woven through

signals.label: 甲午 (정재)
signals.english: a sense for substance and stability runs through the month — a great tree at noon grain woven through

signals.label: 庚申 (겁재)
signals.english: drive and a competitive edge runs through the day — a firm steel grain woven through

signals.label: 천간합 庚-乙 (화금)
signals.english: Soft grass meeting hard iron — the union of benevolence and righteousness, where gentleness tempers strength into something clear and resolved.

signals.label: 해 申-亥 (년주)
signals.english: Monkey and Pig — cleverness and generosity misaligning into accumulating misunderstanding.

signals.label: 지지충 申↔寅 (월주)
signals.english: Tiger and Monkey colliding — drive meeting change, tending to bring frequent movement and travel.

signals.label: 지지형 申-寅 (월주)
signals.english: Tiger, Snake, and Monkey — the punishment of ingratitude, where favors given often go awry, evoking a sense of betrayal.

signals.label: 원진 申-卯 (시주)
signals.english: Rabbit and Monkey resentment — delicacy and cleverness subtly misaligning into mutual displeasure.

signals.label: 대운 통근 재성 분탈 (소모)
signals.english: 2026 decade 甲戌 → Wealth drained (loss)

signals.label: 왕지 — 절정
signals.english: a day when energy rises to its peak

signals.label: 본명 년지 목욕 → 세운 丙午 병
signals.english: your natal year branch stays pressed down — easy to stall

signals.english: your natal month branch flows into a phase where energy weakens — time to rest

signals.english: your natal day branch flows into a phase where energy weakens — time to rest

signals.english: your natal hour branch stays pressed down — easy to stall

signals.english: your natal day branch flows into a phase where energy rises to its peak

signals.label: 용신 활성 — 丙午 세운
signals.english: the Fire energy you most need flows in — a year when your path opens up

signals.label: 정인격
signals.english: The contemplative knower who shelters people with learning and warmth

signals.label: 삼합격
signals.english: Three-harmony (samhap) structure

signals.label: 일진 금 동일 (비겁)
signals.english: today's Metal reinforces (peer/rival) your day master Metal

signals.label: 일진지 금 동일 (비겁)
signals.english: today's branch Metal reinforces (peer/rival) your day master

signals.label: 辛未 일주 — 양털 위 보석 — 우아하고 까다로운 감식안. 당신은 아무거나 받아들이지 않는, 안목이 까다로운 사람이에요.
signals.english: 辛未 day-pillar — A jewel on wool — refined and selective. You don't accept just anything.

signals.label: 조후용신 수 활성
signals.english: Wu-month climate balance — Water is needed to temper the season

signals.label: 午 지장간 여기(丙) ↔ 본명 일주(辛) 암합
signals.english: the hidden stem in 午 lightly entangles your natal day pillar (hidden combine)

signals.label: 정인격 (반성반파)
signals.english: The contemplative knower who shelters people with learning and warmth (half-formed) — the structure is half-formed — it lives or dies by the conditions

signals.label: 공망 활성 — 시기 지지 戌 가 본명 공망 (戌·亥)

signals.english: wealth props up your standing — work and money lift each other

signals.english: This year activates the 8th house (Shared resources · depth · transformation · sex · death and rebirth) — the year's focus rests on this area, and its ruler Mercury is the key mover

signals.label: 첫 토성 회귀 — 진짜 어른됨의 통과의례
signals.english: The rite of adulthood — responsibility, craft and foundation lock in.

crossSignals.label: 정관 × 토성
crossSignals.english: Direct Officer × Saturn — responsibility, law, and structure all firm up; a window to lock in formal commitments.

crossSignals.label: 정관 × 토성
crossSignals.english: Direct Officer × Saturn — responsibility, law, and structure all firm up; a window to lock in formal commitments.

crossSignals.label: 정관 × 태양
crossSignals.english: Direct Officer × Sun — legitimate authority, office, and public standing line up the same way. Favours recognition from above, promotion, and the formal stage.

crossSignals.label: 정관 × 목성
crossSignals.english: Direct Officer × Jupiter — rules and credentials broaden into social trust. Favours licences, public office, and legal legitimacy.

crossSignals.label: 편관 × 화성
crossSignals.english: Seven Killings × Mars — pressure, force, and sudden events hit twice as hard. Decide fast, but slow any clash by a beat.

crossSignals.label: 정재 × 금성
crossSignals.english: Direct Wealth × Venus — stable value, relationships, and assets light up together. Favours marriage, contracts, and purchases.

crossSignals.label: 정재 × 금성
crossSignals.english: Direct Wealth × Venus — stable value, relationships, and assets light up together. Favours marriage, contracts, and purchases.

crossSignals.label: 정인 × 목성
crossSignals.english: Direct Resource × Jupiter — learning, expansion, and tradition all pull the same way. Favours credentials, degrees, and overseas moves.

crossSignals.label: 정인 × 달
crossSignals.english: Direct Resource × Moon — receptivity, care, and a maternal note are doubly strong. Favours rest, healing, and family.

crossSignals.label: 정인 × 토성
crossSignals.english: Direct Resource × Saturn — disciplined, patient mastery of orthodox study. Favours certification exams, long research, and systematic learning.

crossSignals.label: 편인 × 토성
crossSignals.english: Indirect Resource × Saturn — solitary thought, faith, and deep research run deeper. Favours single-minded study.

crossSignals.label: 겁재 × 화성
crossSignals.english: Rob Wealth × Mars — competition, rivalry, and impulse run twice as hot. Sleep on any big money or relationship call.

crossSignals.label: 겁재 × 금성
crossSignals.english: Rob Wealth × Venus — money and relationships become a tug-of-war of taking and being taken from. Sleep on joint spending, guarantees, and love triangles.

crossSignals.label: 정재 × 토성
crossSignals.english: Direct Wealth × Saturn — steady value, commitments, and assets harden with time. The less you rush, the longer it lasts.

crossSignals.label: 정재 × 토성
crossSignals.english: Direct Wealth × Saturn — steady value, commitments, and assets harden with time. The less you rush, the longer it lasts.

allSignals.label: 정관 × 토성
allSignals.english: Direct Officer × Saturn — responsibility, law, and structure all firm up; a window to lock in formal commitments.

allSignals.label: 정관 × 토성
allSignals.english: Direct Officer × Saturn — responsibility, law, and structure all firm up; a window to lock in formal commitments.

allSignals.label: 정관 × 태양
allSignals.english: Direct Officer × Sun — legitimate authority, office, and public standing line up the same way. Favours recognition from above, promotion, and the formal stage.

allSignals.label: 정관 × 목성
allSignals.english: Direct Officer × Jupiter — rules and credentials broaden into social trust. Favours licences, public office, and legal legitimacy.

allSignals.label: 편관 × 화성
allSignals.english: Seven Killings × Mars — pressure, force, and sudden events hit twice as hard. Decide fast, but slow any clash by a beat.

allSignals.label: 정재 × 금성
allSignals.english: Direct Wealth × Venus — stable value, relationships, and assets light up together. Favours marriage, contracts, and purchases.

allSignals.label: 정재 × 금성
allSignals.english: Direct Wealth × Venus — stable value, relationships, and assets light up together. Favours marriage, contracts, and purchases.

allSignals.label: 정인 × 목성
allSignals.english: Direct Resource × Jupiter — learning, expansion, and tradition all pull the same way. Favours credentials, degrees, and overseas moves.

allSignals.label: 정인 × 달
allSignals.english: Direct Resource × Moon — receptivity, care, and a maternal note are doubly strong. Favours rest, healing, and family.

allSignals.label: 정인 × 토성
allSignals.english: Direct Resource × Saturn — disciplined, patient mastery of orthodox study. Favours certification exams, long research, and systematic learning.

allSignals.label: 편인 × 토성
allSignals.english: Indirect Resource × Saturn — solitary thought, faith, and deep research run deeper. Favours single-minded study.

allSignals.label: 겁재 × 화성
allSignals.english: Rob Wealth × Mars — competition, rivalry, and impulse run twice as hot. Sleep on any big money or relationship call.

allSignals.label: 겁재 × 금성
allSignals.english: Rob Wealth × Venus — money and relationships become a tug-of-war of taking and being taken from. Sleep on joint spending, guarantees, and love triangles.

allSignals.label: 정재 × 토성
allSignals.english: Direct Wealth × Saturn — steady value, commitments, and assets harden with time. The less you rush, the longer it lasts.

allSignals.label: 정재 × 토성
allSignals.english: Direct Wealth × Saturn — steady value, commitments, and assets harden with time. The less you rush, the longer it lasts.

appliedPatterns.rule: 시기 정재 + 정관 동시 → 재가 관을 생하는 길로.

crossActivations.meaning: 정당한 권위·직위·공인의 결이 한 방향으로 살아남. 윗선의 인정·승진·공식 무대에 우호.
crossActivations.meaningEn: legitimate authority, office, and public standing line up the same way. Favours recognition from above, promotion, and the formal stage.

crossActivations.meaning: 규범·자격이 사회적 신뢰로 넓어지는 결. 자격·면허·공직·법적 정당화에 우호.
crossActivations.meaningEn: rules and credentials broaden into social trust. Favours licences, public office, and legal legitimacy.

crossActivations.meaning: 강제·압박·돌발 사건의 결이 두 배. 결단은 빠르게, 충돌은 한 박자 늦추기.
crossActivations.meaningEn: pressure, force, and sudden events hit twice as hard. Decide fast, but slow any clash by a beat.

crossActivations.meaning: 안정된 가치·관계·자산의 결이 동시에 살아남. 결혼·계약·구매에 우호.
crossActivations.meaningEn: stable value, relationships, and assets light up together. Favours marriage, contracts, and purchases.

crossActivations.meaning: 학습·확장·정통의 기운이 한 방향으로 흘러요. 자격·학위·해외 우호.
crossActivations.meaningEn: learning, expansion, and tradition all pull the same way. Favours credentials, degrees, and overseas moves.

crossActivations.meaning: 경쟁·분탈·충동 결이 두 배. 큰 돈·관계 결정은 한 박자 늦추기.
crossActivations.meaningEn: competition, rivalry, and impulse run twice as hot. Sleep on any big money or relationship call.

crossActivations.meaning: 책임·법·구조가 강화되는 시기. 공식 절차·약속을 다지기 좋음.
crossActivations.meaningEn: responsibility, law, and structure all firm up; a window to lock in formal commitments.

crossActivations.meaning: 수용·돌봄·어머니 결이 두 배. 휴식·치유·가족 챙기기에 우호.
crossActivations.meaningEn: receptivity, care, and a maternal note are doubly strong. Favours rest, healing, and family.

crossActivations.meaning: 정통 학문을 끈기 있게 다지는 결. 자격 시험·장기 연구·체계적 공부에 우호.
crossActivations.meaningEn: disciplined, patient mastery of orthodox study. Favours certification exams, long research, and systematic learning.

crossActivations.meaning: 돈·관계를 두고 빼앗고 빼앗기는 결. 공동 지출·보증·삼각관계는 한 박자 늦추기.
crossActivations.meaningEn: money and relationships become a tug-of-war of taking and being taken from. Sleep on joint spending, guarantees, and love triangles.

crossActivations.meaning: 꾸준한 가치·약속·자산이 시간을 들여 단단해지는 결. 서두르지 않고 쌓을수록 오래 갑니다.
crossActivations.meaningEn: steady value, commitments, and assets harden with time. The less you rush, the longer it lasts.

crossActivations.meaning: 고립된 사고·종교·연구의 결이 깊어지는 시기. 혼자 파고드는 일에 우호.
crossActivations.meaningEn: solitary thought, faith, and deep research run deeper. Favours single-minded study.

topReasons: ↑ 이달 · 午月 조후 — 수가 열 균형에 필요
↑ 이달 · 목성이 타고난 카이런과 부드러운 기회로 닿는 흐름 — 두 행성이 친근하게 대화하다가, 의식적으로 손을 뻗으면 기회의 통로가 열려요.
↑ 오늘 · 여린 풀과 단단한 무쇠 — 부드러움이 강함을 다듬는 인의(仁義, 어짊과 의로움)의 합으로, 의리와 결단이 살아나요.
↑ 오늘 · 재생관 — 재물이 자리를 밀어주는 흐름 — 일과 돈이 서로를 키워요
topReasonsEn: ↑ month · Jupiter at its best (exaltation) (Cancer) — is honoured and elevated — at its best
↑ month · Wu-month climate balance — Water is needed to temper the season
↑ month · Jupiter opens a gentle opening with natal Chiron — Two planets talk easily and open a doorway of opportunity when you reach for it.
↑ day · Soft grass meeting hard iron — the union of benevolence and righteousness, where gentleness tempers strength into something clear and resolved.
↑ day · wealth props up your standing — work and money lift each other
cautions: ↓ 오늘 · 호랑이와 원숭이의 부딪힘 — 추진과 변화가 부딪쳐 이동·여행이 잦아지기 쉬운 충이에요.
↓ 이달 · 운명 ZR L2 결 풀림 — 쌍둥이자리
↓ 이달 · 화성이 타고난 태양과 팽팽하게 부딪치는 흐름 — 두 행성이 직각으로 부딪치면서 내적 갈등과 행동을 만들어내는 자극제예요.
↓ 이달 · 화성 힘이 약해지는 자리(반대 자리) (황소자리)
↓ 오늘 · 오늘 겁살 — 큰돈·귀중품·중요한 계약은 평소보다 한 번 더 챙기면 좋아요.
cautionsEn: ↓ day · Tiger and Monkey colliding — drive meeting change, tending to bring frequent movement and travel.
↓ month · Fortune ZR L2 Loosing-of-the-Bond — Gemini: a turning point within the sub-period
↓ month · Mars tensions against natal Sun — Two planets clash at a right angle, producing inner tension that forces action.
↓ month · Mars weakened (detriment) (Taurus) — works against its nature — strained
↓ day · Robbery Star active today — Worth double-checking big money, valuables and key contracts today.

hourCrossings.narrative: 꿈과 직관이 활발해져요. 영감이 떠오르면 짧게 메모해두세요.
hourCrossings.narrativeEn: Dreams and intuition come alive. If insight strikes, jot it down.

hourCrossings.narrative: 새 시작이나 도전에 우호적이에요. 일찍 일어나면 흐름이 잘 풀려요.
hourCrossings.narrativeEn: Favorable for fresh starts and bold moves. Early rising pays off.

hourCrossings.narrative: 하루 중 머리가 가장 맑은 시간이에요. 중요한 글쓰기나 기획에 딱 좋아요.
hourCrossings.narrativeEn: Your mind is sharpest now. Best window for writing and big-picture planning.

hourCrossings.narrative: 가까운 사람과 나누는 대화나 소소한 정리가 관계를 단단하게 만들어요.
hourCrossings.narrativeEn: Talks with close ones and small tidy-ups strengthen bonds.
hourCrossings.crossMeaning: 정관 × 목성 — 규범·자격이 사회적 신뢰로 넓어지는 결. 자격·면허·공직·법적 정당화에 우호.
hourCrossings.crossMeaningEn: Direct Officer × Jupiter — rules and credentials broaden into social trust. Favours licences, public office, and legal legitimacy.

hourCrossings.narrative: 꿈, 창작, 잠들기 전 짧은 영감 노트가 자리잡기 좋아요.
hourCrossings.narrativeEn: A good time for dreams, creative bursts, and a quick pre-sleep note.

hourCrossings.narrative: 명상하거나 중요한 결정을 다시 점검해보기 좋은 시간이에요.
hourCrossings.narrativeEn: A good window to meditate or revisit important decisions.
hourCrossings.crossMeaning: 정관 × 목성 — 규범·자격이 사회적 신뢰로 넓어지는 결. 자격·면허·공직·법적 정당화에 우호.
hourCrossings.crossMeaningEn: Direct Officer × Jupiter — rules and credentials broaden into social trust. Favours licences, public office, and legal legitimacy.

hourMoon.meaning: 위축·피로가 오는 시각 — 무리 말고 쉬어가세요.
hourMoon.meaningEn: Heaviness and fatigue set in — don’t push; rest.

hourMoon.meaning: 과욕·과신이 쉬운 시각 — 크게 벌이기 전에 한 번 더.
hourMoon.meaningEn: Overreach is easy — sanity-check before going big.

hourMoon.meaning: 기분·활력이 차오르는 시각 — 중요한 약속·활동에 좋아요.
hourMoon.meaningEn: Mood and vitality rise — good for key meetings and activity.
Drive and push kick in — good for exercise, decisions, breakthroughs.

hourMoon.meaning: 감정 소비·과소비가 쉬운 시각 — 지갑과 마음 단속.
hourMoon.meaningEn: Easy to overspend on feeling — guard wallet and heart.
